chat.content: You help design a compression layer.
[DECISION D1 since=t1] use lexical extraction, no embeddings
[CONSTRAINT R2 scope=infra] offline only, no LLM calls
[CLAIM C1 status=active evidence=likely] state must fit 500 tokens
[CLAIM C2 status=active evidence=untested] long sessions need bigger budget
[DISCARD X1] embeddings for semantic compression | reason: breaks offline determinism
[DISCARD X2] auto-summarize the chat | reason: violates state-not-summary
[QUESTION Q1 blocking] how to size budget per session length
[DECISION D2 since=t3 replaces=D1] use structural markers, not lexical extraction
And we discussed many other things in the chat too, like the weather and which font we prefer for the report; this should NOT end up in the state.
